name: Oversized Tie-Dye Beach Towel Navy Blue - Sun Squad™: 100% Cotton, Jumbo Size, Lightweight, Machine Washable
description:
Enjoy lounging in the sun and sand with this Oversized Tie-Dye Beach Towel from Sun Squad™. Showcasing a navy blue tie-dye pattern with fringe edges, this beach towel adds a touch of style to your waterside activities. The lightweight oversized beach towel is made of cotton in a terry weave that's perfect for spreading out on the sand or drying off at the pool.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
